title: Starting School
summary: In our season finale, we’re joined by Trudi Browne - Assistant Principal at Burnside Primary and expert in New Entrant learning - to chat all things starting school. Whether your tamaiti is feeling ready or a little nervous, Trudi shares smart, simple ways to support them through this exciting new chapter.  If you enjoyed this episode, hit subscribe, share it with a friend, or leave a quick review - it helps more parents find us. You can also connect with us on Instagram @hapuclub.

title: Jessica Urlichs
summary: Sunday Times Bestselling author and poet Jessica Urlichs has a way of turning the raw, real moments of motherhood into words that resonate across the globe. In this episode, we talk about raising neurodivergent tamariki, finding inspiration in the everyday, and how sharing her story has helped so many others feel seen. If you enjoyed this episode, hit subscribe, share it with a friend, or leave a quick review - it helps more parents find us. You can also connect with us on Instagram @hapuclub.

title: Guy Mansell
summary: This week, I'm joined by broadcaster, digital creator and stay-at-home dad Guy Mansell, who's gearing up for baby number two. We chat about the transition from one kid to two and parenting through mental health challenges.   If you enjoyed this episode, hit subscribe, share it with a friend, or leave a quick review - it helps more parents find us. You can also connect with us on Instagram @hapuclub.

title: Lou Walker
summary: This week I’m joined by powerhouse māmā Lou Walker. We kōrero about raising tamariki Māori who are proud and connected to their culture, what it means to be "equally yoked", and the wild ride of breastfeeding, co-sleeping and building an empire… all at once.   If you enjoyed this episode, hit subscribe, share it with a friend, or leave a quick review - it helps more parents find us. You can also connect with us on Instagram @hapuclub.
